summary: Docker-based reproduction demonstrates uncaught exception crash when parsing ONNX text with overflow numeric literals (ir_version:999...999 or float 1e999999)
expected_security_impact: Application should crash or throw uncaught std::out_of_range exception when parsing malicious ONNX text with overflow numeric literals
actual_observed_result: Reproduction successfully triggered RuntimeError/std::out_of_range exception when parsing ir_version:99999999999999999999999999999999999 and float 1e999999, demonstrating uncaught exception vulnerability
verification_method: Automated verification script checks for RuntimeError, std::out_of_range, or crash signals in output. Distinguishes from normal parse errors by checking for numeric overflow specific exception types.
evidence_produced_by_run: Stack trace shows parser.h:283 or parser.h:303 in call chain
Application terminated abnormally or Python exception propagated

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository from GitHub, checks out the vulnerable version, and mounts that checkout into the container.
